meta.objective: Create a self-contained, highly engaging website that teaches every component of the supplied LLM curriculum from scratch, with simple and deep explanations, interactive components, and independent grading of every component to at least 85% effectiveness and accuracy.

tasks.title: Course architecture and curriculum model
tasks.objective: Create the complete curriculum map, pedagogical structure, and reusable lesson schema for all 28 topics shown in the supplied curriculum screenshots.
acceptanceCriteria: All 28 curriculum topics are represented exactly once and grouped into Architecture, Pre-Training, Post-Training, and Advanced tracks
Every topic has a simple explanation, deep explanation, key ideas, mental model, worked example, misconception, and knowledge check
The dependency-ordered learning path and course progress model are defined
tasks.details: Create the content model and course data in app/course-data.ts; initialize the site metadata and test coverage for curriculum completeness.

validationCommands.evidence: Starter Cloudflare ambient types are supplied by the build runtime, not standalone tsc

acceptanceCheckResults.details: Prerequisite IDs and ordered lesson numbers included

commit.message: Task T001: Course architecture and curriculum model

tasks.title: Immersive course interface
tasks.objective: Build a responsive, accessible course experience with a memorable visual system and low-friction navigation across all lessons.
acceptanceCriteria: Landing view clearly communicates the learning journey and lets learners enter the course
Desktop and mobile navigation support tracks, search, previous/next lesson movement, and progress
Lesson view progressively discloses simple and deep explanations without overwhelming beginners
Keyboard focus, contrast, reduced motion, semantic landmarks, and touch targets are supported
tasks.details: Replace the starter with the finished course shell in app/page.tsx and app/globals.css; add client-side course navigation and local progress persistence.

validationCommands.evidence: Production build and 2 rendered-page tests passed

acceptanceCheckResults.details: Narrative hero, track map, and resume action implemented
Desktop sidebar and mobile course-map drawer implemented
Plain English and Under the hood explanation modes
Semantic landmarks, focus styles, reduced motion, and responsive touch controls included

tasks.title: Interactive learning laboratories
tasks.objective: Add hands-on visual simulations that make the hardest LLM concepts manipulable and concrete.
acceptanceCriteria: Tokenization, embeddings, positional encoding, attention, next-token prediction, scaling, optimization, LoRA, MoE, distillation, and preference learning have relevant interactive demonstrations
Every lab explains what to change, what to observe, and why the result matters
Labs remain usable with keyboard controls and on narrow screens
tasks.details: Create reusable interactive lesson labs and connect each to the appropriate curriculum topics.

validationCommands.evidence: 3 content and lab coverage tests passed

acceptanceCheckResults.details: Tokenization, vectors, positions, attention, prediction, scaling, optimization, preference, LoRA, MoE, distillation, and RL implemented
Every lab has explicit change instruction and causal observation
Native controls, buttons, labels, focus styles, and narrow layouts included

tasks.title: Assessment and mastery system
tasks.objective: Add active-recall quizzes, immediate explanatory feedback, lesson completion, and a capstone learning path.
acceptanceCriteria: Every lesson has a meaningful knowledge check with explanatory feedback
Progress persists locally and can be reset
Track and overall completion are visible
The GPT-2, LLaMA 3, and Tulu 3 case studies synthesize earlier concepts
tasks.details: Implement quiz interactions, mastery feedback, completion controls, persisted progress, and capstone synthesis links.

acceptanceCheckResults.details: 28 quizzes with immediate correctness and conceptual explanations
Local progress, track counters, overall percentage, and reset confirmation
GPT-2, Llama 3, and Tulu 3 maps link prerequisite concepts

commit.message: Task T004: Assessment and mastery system

tasks.title: Independent curriculum grading and iteration
tasks.objective: Have a separate grading agent evaluate every curriculum topic for accuracy and teaching effectiveness, then revise until every topic scores at least 85%.
acceptanceCriteria: A grading report contains an accuracy score and teaching-effectiveness score for all 28 topics
Every topic achieves an overall score of at least 85% after revisions
All grader-identified high-impact gaps are addressed
Build, tests, and final objective verification pass
tasks.details: Run an independent grading agent against the course data and implementation, iterate on content and interactions, preserve grading evidence, and complete final build/validation.
